case_title: EDERLINA REYES VS. JOHANNA KARINA ESPEJO et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, EDERLINA AS TO DEFENDANT ESPEJO, JOHANNA KARINA MARTINEZ, ALCIDES BOYLE, CRAIG OLIVERA, JUAN DOES 1 TO 20, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR JUN-27-2008 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-24-2008 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         JUN-12-2008
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR MAY-20-2008 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE PROOF OF SERVICE ON MAY-20-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, EDERLINA JURY DEMANDED, ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 4.0 DAYS
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUN-27-2008 CONTINUED TO OCT-03-2008 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 212, TO OBTAIN ANSWER, ENTER DEFAULT, OR FILE UNINSURED MOTORIST APPLICATION. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF OCT-03-2008 IS OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

DECLARATION OF CRAIG M. BOEGER ESQ.,IN SUPPORT OF REQUEST THAT CASE BE DESIGNATED AN UNINSURED MOTORIST CASE AND REQUEST FOR EXEMPTION FROM AB3300 UNINISURED MOTORIST CASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, EDERLINA
RESPONSE TO ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FILED BY PLAINTIFF REYES, EDERLINA
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
